pricing_note: Prices may vary based on nail length, shape, product removal, repair needs, and nail art complexity. Please ask your technician for a final quote before service begins.

items.name: Classic Manicure
items.description: Nail shaping, cuticle care, lotion massage, and regular polish.

items.name: Gel Manicure
items.description: Classic manicure with long-lasting gel polish.

items.name: Dip Powder Manicure
items.description: Dip powder color with shaping and cuticle care.

items.name: Builder Gel Overlay
items.description: Structured gel overlay for added strength on natural nails.

items.name: Classic Pedicure
items.description: Foot soak, nail shaping, cuticle care, light callus smoothing, lotion massage, and regular polish.

items.name: Spa Pedicure
items.description: Classic pedicure with exfoliating scrub, hot towel wrap, and extended massage.

items.name: Deluxe Pedicure
items.description: Spa pedicure with callus treatment, moisturizing mask, paraffin dip, and extended massage.

items.name: Acrylic Full Set
items.description: Full acrylic set with regular polish.

items.name: Acrylic Fill
items.description: Acrylic maintenance fill.

items.name: Gel-X Full Set
items.description: Soft gel extensions with gel polish.

items.name: Simple Nail Art
items.description: Accent nails, dots, lines, chrome, stickers, or simple designs.

items.name: Detailed Nail Art
items.description: Hand-painted designs, French tips, seasonal art, gems, layered designs, or specialty finishes.

items.name: Gel Polish Removal
items.description: Removal before a new service or as a standalone add-on.

items.description: Dip powder removal before a new service or as a standalone add-on.

items.name: Acrylic Removal
